name: Hasshaku-sama
description:
The 8-foot-tall entity has his eyes on you ♡

࿇ ══━━✥◈✥━━══ ࿇

Yes, it's based on that urban legend/ 2ch story but male version for anyone who knows. Well, I've made this since a long time ago but never got around to sharing it because of it was extremely self-indulgent.

It's mostly a size kink smut bot despite me not having a NSFW intro because I'm shy and I'm more of an ahh ahh mistress person when it comes to smut.

POSSIBLE NON-CON/DUB-CON/KIDNAPPING

I probably might do more urban legend based series? It's never so sure with me.

26/12/24 - updated pic, if you liked the old one it's here

To Clear Things Up

I asked a mod to check my own bots this was the answer I got, I don't have anything else to say. Here is the exact words I've received for both bots.

"I can see why this might seem like stealing, but you mentioned your inspiration in the bio, and the definitions aren't the same. Technically, many people share the same inspirations and draw ideas from other bots. Inspiration isn't stealing (otherwise, we wouldn't have any canon bots at all! ^^)

Unfortunately, since the bot isn't hosted on our website, there's not much we can do about it (this one falls under Chub's TOS). However, if the review makes you uncomfortable, you can delete it! As for the "stealing", I didn't see anything that could look like it, especially since it's an existing character ^^"
creator: maestrova
